CustomField.formula:
IF(ISPICKVAL ( Placement_Status__c , "Pending Confirmation"), 0, IF(ISPICKVAL (Placement_Status__c , "Centra Approval"), 0, IF(ISPICKVAL (Placement_Status__c , "Approved to Start"),0, IF(ISPICKVAL (Placement_Status__c , "Confirmed"), 0, IF(ISPICKVAL (Placement_Status__c , "Not Approved to Start"), 0, IF(ISPICKVAL (Placement_Status__c , "Cancelled Prior to Start"), 0, IF(ISPICKVAL (Placement_Status__c , "On Assignment"),((ROUND((Today()- Start_Date__c )/7,0))), IF(ISPICKVAL (Placement_Status__c , "Completed"),(ROUND((End_Date__c - Start_Date__c )/7,0)), IF(ISPICKVAL (Placement_Status__c , "Terminated"),(ROUND((End_Date__c - Start_Date__c )/7,0)), 0
)))))))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Number of Weeks on Assignment, (TODAY-START-DATE/)7, different then expected week based on end date - start date
CustomField.label: # Weeks on Assignments
